security.allowed_origins: # Local development — MCP Inspector, Claude Desktop, Claude Code, ChatGPT Desktop http://localhost* https://localhost* http://127.0.0.1* https://127.0.0.1* # Claude (Anthropic) — web + remote MCP connectors https://claude.ai https://claude.com # ChatGPT (OpenAI) — web https://chatgpt.com https://chat.openai.com # Google Gemini https://gemini.google.com # Microsoft Copilot https://copilot.microsoft.com # xAI Grok https://grok.com # Perplexity https://www.perplexity.ai
